name: Suspicious File Download via Certreq
description: Detects the use of `certreq.exe` to download files, a technique adversaries can use to retrieve payloads from their command and control servers. While `certreq.exe` is a legitimate tool, its use for downloading arbitrary files is unusual.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'certreq.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the certreq.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute certreq.exe, including parameters for downloading files via HTTP.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which certreq.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
